SEARCH

Uses of Class
org.ddolib.common.solver.stat.DdoStats

Packages that use DdoStats
Package
Description
org.ddolib.common.solver.stat
Provides classes for tracking and representing the statistics and status of a search process in a solver.
org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion
Provides interfaces and classes for defining termination criteria (stop criteria) for search processes.

  • Uses of DdoStats in org.ddolib.common.solver.stat

    Methods in org.ddolib.common.solver.stat that return DdoStats
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.addNodes(int nodes)
    Updates the total number of nodes created.
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.copy()
    Creates and returns a copy of this statistics instance.
    protected DdoStats
    DdoStats.createSpecificInstance()
    Creates a new instance of the specific subclass with initial values.
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.incrementNbIter()
    Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with the iteration count incremented by one.
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.updateFrontierMaxSize(int frontierSize)
    Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated maximum frontier size.
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.updateGap(double gap)
    Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated optimality gap.
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.updateIncumbent(double incumbent, double gap)
    Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated incumbent value and gap.
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.updateLowerBound(double lb)
    Updates the best lower bound and tracks its improvement iteration.
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.updateMaxDepth(int depth)
    Updates the maximum depth reached.
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.updateStatus(SearchStatus status)
    Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated search status.
    DdoStats
    DdoStats.updateTime(long time)
    Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated current time.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    DdoStopCriterion.testDdoStats(DdoStats stats)
    Evaluates this criterion against the given DDO search statistics.
